div1.entryFree: Minstrel, one who sings and makes music for money: feast-finding --s, tuning my defame, Lucr. 817. I will bid thee draw, as we do the --s, Ado V, 1, 129. none but --s like of sonneting, LLL IV, 3, 158. I hear the --s play, Shr. III, 2, 185. consort! what, dost thou make us --s? an thou make --s of us, look to hear nothing but discords, Rom. III, 1, 49. Rom. III, 1, 49 no money, on my faith, but the gleek; I will give you the m. IV, 5, 116.
